chapters.title: Early Climb
chapters.content: Ethan started climbing before sunrise. The mountain trail was steep, but the cold morning air made the journey feel exciting.

chapters.title: Unexpected Storm
chapters.content: Halfway to the top, dark clouds appeared. Rain and wind made the path dangerous, and Ethan had to move carefully.

chapters.title: The View Above
chapters.content: When the storm passed, the sky opened and sunlight covered the mountains. From the top, the entire valley looked peaceful and endless.
